records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha Dam, I heard you've been dreaming every night.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha Dam, I heard you've been dreaming every night.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha Dam, I heard you've been dreaming every night.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What kind of dreams are they?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What kind of dreams are they?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What kind of dreams are they?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dreams where I see the life of someone I've never been as if it were my own. I live and die, again and again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dreams where I see the life of someone I've never been as if it were my own. I live and die, again and again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dreams where I see the life of someone I've never been as if it were my own. I live and die, again and again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And in those dreams, there's always a beautiful woman.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And in those dreams, there's always a beautiful woman.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And in those dreams, there's always a beautiful woman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does she always look the same?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does she always look the same?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does she always look the same?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. She's someone different each time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. She's someone different each time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. She's someone different each time.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
But there's one thing that stays the same
8v She always calls me Seosaeng.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
But there's one thing that stays the same
8v She always calls me Seosaeng.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
But there's one thing that stays the same
8v She always calls me Seosaeng.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then it's no ordinary dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then it's no ordinary dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then it's no ordinary dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then what would you call it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then what would you call it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then what would you call it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A kind of deja vu.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A kind of deja vu.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A kind of deja vu.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like recognizing an ancient relic you've never seen before, or landing a perfect score your first time on the range.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like recognizing an ancient relic you've never seen before, or landing a perfect score your first time on the range.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like recognizing an ancient relic you've never seen before, or landing a perfect score your first time on the range.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I assumed that was just thanks to my natural talent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I assumed that was just thanks to my natural talent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I assumed that was just thanks to my natural talent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Young prodigies don't talk like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Young prodigies don't talk like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Young prodigies don't talk like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You stand out because you've lived that kind of life dozens, even hundreds of times over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You stand out because you've lived that kind of life dozens, even hundreds of times over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You stand out because you've lived that kind of life dozens, even hundreds of times over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what you're saying is that this body houses a soul that's far older than it seems?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what you're saying is that this body houses a soul that's far older than it seems?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what you're saying is that this body houses a soul that's far older than it seems?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Close enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Close enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Close enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
That old soul clings to you even in death. A curse
8v that sticks through every life you live.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
That old soul clings to you even in death. A curse
8v that sticks through every life you live.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
That old soul clings to you even in death. A curse
8v that sticks through every life you live.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I call it <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I call it <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I call it <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
If I understand correctly
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
If I understand correctly
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
If I understand correctly
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Reincarnation is real, and others like me have worked with the Administration before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Reincarnation is real, and others like me have worked with the Administration before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Reincarnation is real, and others like me have worked with the Administration before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fate seems to favor your mind. You've invented something remarkable in every life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fate seems to favor your mind. You've invented something remarkable in every life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fate seems to favor your mind. You've invented something remarkable in every life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But every time, your story ends the same. You die for some absurd reason. A genius fated to burn out early, never escaping that loop.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But every time, your story ends the same. You die for some absurd reason. A genius fated to burn out early, never escaping that loop.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But every time, your story ends the same. You die for some absurd reason. A genius fated to burn out early, never escaping that loop.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And this cycle. You said it began when some immortal Tiger laid a curse called <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color> upon me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And this cycle. You said it began when some immortal Tiger laid a curse called <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color> upon me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And this cycle. You said it began when some immortal Tiger laid a curse called <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color> upon me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We call that immortal Tiger, <color=#ffd34c>the Beast</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We call that immortal Tiger, <color=#ffd34c>the Beast</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We call that immortal Tiger, <color=#ffd34c>the Beast</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration has been fighting to eliminate <color=#ffd34c>the Beasts</color> for a long time. Even to this day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration has been fighting to eliminate <color=#ffd34c>the Beasts</color> for a long time. Even to this day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration has been fighting to eliminate <color=#ffd34c>the Beasts</color> for a long time. Even to this day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are we talking about the same Beast that razed my hometown?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are we talking about the same Beast that razed my hometown?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are we talking about the same Beast that razed my hometown?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every disaster that takes lives is tragic, sure. But this <color=#ffd34c>Beast</color> is something far worse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every disaster that takes lives is tragic, sure. But this <color=#ffd34c>Beast</color> is something far worse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every disaster that takes lives is tragic, sure. But this <color=#ffd34c>Beast</color> is something far worse.

records.m_Talk_DEU: I've met many strong individuals within the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've met many strong individuals within the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If they're that capable, why haven't they taken the Tiger down?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If they're that capable, why haven't they taken the Tiger down?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If they're that capable, why haven't they taken the Tiger down?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Partly because the Tiger is cunning. But more than that, there's a reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Partly because the Tiger is cunning. But more than that, there's a reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyone not <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color> can't so much as leave a scratch on <color=#ffd34c>the Beasts</color>.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyone not <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color> can't so much as leave a scratch on <color=#ffd34c>the Beasts</color>.



records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not following you to your grave.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The living should look toward tomorrow, not back at yesterday.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The living should look toward tomorrow, not back at yesterday.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The living should look toward tomorrow, not back at yesterday.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You say that
8v But are you really looking toward tomorrow?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You say that
8v But are you really looking toward tomorrow?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You say that
8v But are you really looking toward tomorrow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're always chasing the past.

records.m_Talk_FRA: You're always chasing the past.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Andy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Andy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Andy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I chase the past, so I don't repeat a regretful tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I chase the past, so I don't repeat a regretful tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I chase the past, so I don't repeat a regretful tomorrow.

Seriously
8v

Seriously
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Seriously
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then what?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Then what?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Once I achieve that, I'll worry about the rest then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once I achieve that, I'll worry about the rest then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Life's beauty lies in never knowing what comes two steps ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Life's beauty lies in never knowing what comes two steps ahead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Life's beauty lies in never knowing what comes two steps ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
That's

8v

That's
8v well
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
That's
8v well
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not something a genius says. Sounds more like what a clueless fool would, though.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Not something a genius says. Sounds more like what a clueless fool would, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh. Granny's calling.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh. Granny's calling.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Jisoo? Where is she now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Jisoo? Where is she now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She went to check that well you fell into. Wanted to see if it's still intact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She went to check that well you fell into. Wanted to see if it's still intact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She went to check that well you fell into. Wanted to see if it's still intact.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha Dam, I heard you've been dreaming every night.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha Dam, I heard you've been dreaming every night.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha Dam, I heard you've been dreaming every night.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What kind of dreams are they?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What kind of dreams are they?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What kind of dreams are they?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dreams where I see the life of someone I've never been as if it were my own. I live and die, again and again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dreams where I see the life of someone I've never been as if it were my own. I live and die, again and again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dreams where I see the life of someone I've never been as if it were my own. I live and die, again and again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And in those dreams, there's always a beautiful woman.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And in those dreams, there's always a beautiful woman.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And in those dreams, there's always a beautiful woman.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Does she always look the same?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Does she always look the same?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Does she always look the same?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. She's someone different each time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. She's someone different each time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. She's someone different each time.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
But there's one thing that stays the same
8v She always calls me Seosaeng.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
But there's one thing that stays the same
8v She always calls me Seosaeng.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
But there's one thing that stays the same
8v She always calls me Seosaeng.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then it's no ordinary dream.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then it's no ordinary dream.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then it's no ordinary dream.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then what would you call it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then what would you call it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then what would you call it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A kind of deja vu.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A kind of deja vu.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A kind of deja vu.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like recognizing an ancient relic you've never seen before, or landing a perfect score your first time on the range.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like recognizing an ancient relic you've never seen before, or landing a perfect score your first time on the range.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like recognizing an ancient relic you've never seen before, or landing a perfect score your first time on the range.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I assumed that was just thanks to my natural talent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I assumed that was just thanks to my natural talent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I assumed that was just thanks to my natural talent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Young prodigies don't talk like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Young prodigies don't talk like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Young prodigies don't talk like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You stand out because you've lived that kind of life dozens, even hundreds of times over.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You stand out because you've lived that kind of life dozens, even hundreds of times over.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You stand out because you've lived that kind of life dozens, even hundreds of times over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So what you're saying is that this body houses a soul that's far older than it seems?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So what you're saying is that this body houses a soul that's far older than it seems?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So what you're saying is that this body houses a soul that's far older than it seems?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Close enough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Close enough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Close enough.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
That old soul clings to you even in death. A curse
8v that sticks through every life you live.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
That old soul clings to you even in death. A curse
8v that sticks through every life you live.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
That old soul clings to you even in death. A curse
8v that sticks through every life you live.

root.m_Talk_DEU: I call it <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I call it <color=#ffd34c>Earthbound</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
If I understand correctly
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
If I understand correctly
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
If I understand correctly
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: Reincarnation is real, and others like me have worked with the Administration before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Reincarnation is real, and others like me have worked with the Administration before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Reincarnation is real, and others like me have worked with the Administration before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fate seems to favor your mind. You've invented something remarkable in every life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fate seems to favor your mind. You've invented something remarkable in every life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fate seems to favor your mind. You've invented something remarkable in every life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But every time, your story ends the same. You die for some absurd reason. A genius fated to burn out early, never escaping that loop.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But every time, your story ends the same. You die for some absurd reason. A genius fated to burn out early, never escaping that loop.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But every time, your story ends the same. You die for some absurd reason. A genius fated to burn out early, never escaping that loop.

root.m_Talk_DEU: We call that immortal Tiger, <color=#ffd34c>the Beast</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We call that immortal Tiger, <color=#ffd34c>the Beast</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration has been fighting to eliminate <color=#ffd34c>the Beasts</color> for a long time. Even to this day.

root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration has been fighting to eliminate <color=#ffd34c>the Beasts</color> for a long time. Even to this day.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Are we talking about the same Beast that razed my hometown?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are we talking about the same Beast that razed my hometown?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every disaster that takes lives is tragic, sure. But this <color=#ffd34c>Beast</color> is something far worse.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Every disaster that takes lives is tragic, sure. But this <color=#ffd34c>Beast</color> is something far worse.
